articles.title: Jahangir Khan held after two weeks on the run: How Bengal police tracked down TMC's 'Pushpa'
articles.summary: Trinamool candidate Jahangir Khan, nicknamed 'Pushpa', was apprehended near the India-Nepal border after evading arrest for two weeks. Facing multiple criminal charges including murder and extortion, Khan had planned to flee to Nepal.

articles.title: CBSE Class 12 re-evaluation window closes: When will revised results be declared?
articles.summary: The CBSE has concluded its application window for Class 12 marks verification and re-evaluation, which ran from June 2 to June 7. Over 1.6 lakh students submitted requests for more than 3.8 lakh answer books, despite facing cyber threats.

articles.title: AIBE 21 answer key 2026 to be released soon at allindiabarexamination.com: Check steps to download
articles.summary: The Bar Council of India will soon release the provisional answer key and response sheet for the All India Bar Examination 21. Candidates can download these to estimate their scores.

articles.title: ICSI CS December 2026 Schedule Out: Exams to begin from December 21- Check all dates
articles.summary: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has released the examination schedule for the CS Executive and Professional December 2026 session. Both exams will be conducted offline from December 21 to December 28, 2026, with papers held daily from 2 pm to 5:15 pm..

articles.title: UPSSSC BCG Technician Mains result 2026 released at upsssc.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
articles.summary: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission has announced the BCG Technician Mains examination 2026 results. Candidates can check their scores on the official UPSSSC website.
